response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for this junior role, has no demonstrable experience in insurance or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops
Proven ability to lead and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling)
concerns: Minimal Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skills are only basic, not sufficient for client-facing consulting
Overqualified and senior-level background may not align with entry-level expectations
